name: spaces

metadata.name: spaces
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# Hugging Face Spaces

## Installation

`pip install spaces`

functions.name: spaces.zero.decorator.GPU

returns.name: Callable[[Callable[P, R]], Callable[P, R]] | Callable[P, R]

documentation:
ZeroGPU decorator

Basic usage:
    ```
    @spaces.GPU
    def fn(...):
        # CUDA is available here
        pass
    ```

With custom duration:
    ```
    @spaces.GPU(duration=45) # Expressed in seconds
    def fn(...):
        # CUDA is available here
        pass
    ```

Args:
    task (`Callable | None`): Python function that requires CUDA
    duration (`int | datetime.timedelta`): Estimated duration in seconds or `datetime.timedelta`

Returns:
    `Callable`: GPU-ready function

classes.name: spaces.zero.torch.patching.DefaultDispatchMode
documentation: When enabling DispatchMode, some aten ops are dispatched to FunctionMode
We are using it for aten.alias.default and aten.set_.source_Tensor
